message:
fix(wasm): add missing symbols for WASM build

- Add pub to frozen_dispatch_count and frozen_dispatch_check_and_reset
- Force linker to include native_dispatch symbols via comptime reference
- Add newObject and createClosure methods to JSValueWasm32

WASM builds now work:
- fib Binary: 3072ms
- fib AOT: 5949ms
- fib WASM: 70604ms
